ops.text: capt-hook's hook wrapper (`uvx --isolated capt-hook run <Event>`) fails closed with no offline fallback: during a machine-wide DNS outage on 2026-07-19 every PreToolUse invocation re-resolved capt-hook from PyPI, failed on DNS, and blocked ALL tool calls (Write, Read, TaskList, ccx alike) for the whole outage — the session could do literally nothing, including purely local file reads. A cached/`--offline`-first resolution (uvx honors a warm cache when the index is unreachable only if not `--isolated`) or a fail-open-on-network-error policy for read-only tools would have kept the session alive.
